home.heroPretitle: To the Digital Home of Cyclists
home.heroSubtitle: Bicylium is a vertical, multi-stakeholder ecosystem platform that brings local bicycle shops in Turkey into the digital world and connects them with bicycle users.
home.compatibilityDesc: Prevents losses caused by incorrect orders.
home.noCommissionDesc: As your earnings increase, the platform participation fee remains fixed.
home.supportDesc: As a solidarity economy, we are with you at every moment of the process.
home.digitalize: Bring your bike shop and workshop to digital
home.customizedDesc: Advanced product search and part compatibility architecture structured for the unique features of the cycling world
home.advancedProductsDesc: Specially prepared product categories for countless equipment and accessories.
home.communityPower: Let's turn the power of our community into production
home.communityPowerDesc: Bicylium is not just a product sales platform. As our network expands, the community layer will strengthen, paving the way for our production goals and making a positive contribution to our industry.
home.collabCtaPretitle: Become One of the Founding Stores of the Ecosystem
home.collabCtaDesc: Learn more about Bicylium's collaboration principles, system structure and operation. Review the presentation and participate in the survey
home.newsletterDesc: Don't miss campaigns, discounts and innovations
home.newsletterSuccess: You have successfully subscribed to the newsletter!

about.whatIsDesc1: Bicylium is a vertical, multi-vendor ecosystem platform that brings local bicycle shops in Turkey into the digital world and connects them with bicycle users. It goes beyond being just a product sales platform; it builds the digital home of the Turkish bicycle industry with its marketplace, service appointment network, community, and content layers. By centering the tradition of "craftsmanship" and the solidarity economy of bicycle culture, it creates a deep, profitable, and sustainable value chain that generic e-commerce giants cannot replicate.
about.whatIsDesc2: Bicylium is a digitalization and growth tool for bicycle shops, and a purchasing and service guide for bicycle users. The platform transforms shopping from a mere "add to cart" process into an expertly framed experience.
about.storyDesc1: Bicylium emerged in 2025 as a participatory initiative with the goal of bringing bicycle shops and users together in the online world. It aims to create a solidarity economy by paving the way for digitalization for the human stories, craftsmanship, and local values revolving around bicycles.
about.storyDesc2: As a bicycle ecosystem, it views the bicycle not merely as a means of transportation but as a healing element that completes the human being. It continues the path opened by Turkey's unique masters, preserves the ancestral heritage, and goes beyond being a business model. It stands the test of time and becomes the determining element in the sector in the long run; it exists with its solid, focused, grounded structure and the self-confidence of creating its own culture. It reflects the perfection of cycling in the online shopping and interaction experience and is positioned as the platform the industry deserves.
about.storyDesc3: As an initiative, it defends the environment and nature with a sharp stance, produces qualified content and technology by maintaining its line in every field, and makes cycling sustainable.
about.storyDesc4: Bicylium was conceived by those from the cycling school, so anywhere there is a bicycle is a business address for Bicylium in a decentralized way. The leadership team consists of a young, highly equipped, and educated team in their backgrounds, who give the necessary value to themselves and their work, approach it seriously, and always desire the better.
about.philosophyDesc1: Our philosophy prioritizes an boundlessly principled community and a fair income model. Against monetization and brokerage, we defend decentralization, transparency, and an autonomous structure, meaning we believe that the owners of Bicylium should be its users and members. To fulfill its responsibility towards nature, its stakeholders, and society, Bicylium does not need exorbitant commissions; it needs unity, joint action, and independence. Therefore, it argues that the economic cycle it mediates should be managed with a common mind together with its participants. We believe that this kind of stakeholder mechanism is the solution formula for economic problems in the bicycle sector and perhaps other social areas that will develop the production path for our country.
about.philosophyDesc2: Our priority is to bring this model, which started as an initiative, to its most economically sustainable form with persistent transparency. Your support is the most important contribution on the way to realizing our mission of creating the 'Digital Home of Cyclists' and our vision of creating a productive economy.
about.principlesSubtitle: Our principles determine our approach and policies towards our work and stakeholders.
about.principle1Desc: The profitability of your physical shop and the awareness of your expertise are priorities. Bicylium supports you by bringing your story to the forefront and ensuring your customers recognize you locally.
about.principle2Desc: Beyond being a sustainability policy, we act with love for nature and the instinct to protect it, reaching the point of activism. We expect all our stakeholders to have the same approach because together we can achieve more.
about.principle3Desc: Our intention is clear: to turn value into value and preserve it. To enable more workshops to open, more athletes to be trained, and local products to be produced. Therefore, whether you are a store owner or a customer, we want you to know which mission you support.
about.principle4Desc: We are against monopolization and coerciveness in the sector. We build solidarity under one roof with those who think like us. Other than that, we defend the richness and diversity of our stakeholders.
about.principle5Desc: Under the umbrella of solidarity, every stakeholder is equal.
about.principle6Desc: Because first and foremost, we must be honest with ourselves. If we fail to do so, we cannot fulfill our missions and reach our goals.
about.principle7Desc: In the face of exploitation, we defend the solidarity economy. We ensure that profit is not made over someone else's savings and labor, but that they are treated fairly.
about.principle8Desc: Being an example and pioneer in the sector, being the one who starts the movement and lights the first spark excites and makes us very proud.
about.positionIntro: Bicylium is not an ordinary e-commerce site; it is a deep, ancient structure that understands the "human-machine" bond. In order not to get lost in the noise of the market, it draws its strength not from superficial marketing tactics, but from deep-rooted philosophical movements and a clear archetype. Bicylium's core character is a Connector that brings the ecosystem together with an Artisan who glorifies labor and craftsmanship.
about.positionQuote1: “For conscious riders who see their bicycle as a lifestyle, Bicylium is the only platform in Digital E-commerce that provides 100% compatibility and integrated service appointments with filters exclusive to bicycles.”
about.positionQuote2: "For bicycle enthusiasts and local shop owners, Bicylium is a vertical niche marketplace that makes local craftsmen visible and builds community. Unlike the broker approach, it highlights the tradition of craftsmanship and transparent commission."
about.positionQuote3: “Bicylium is Turkey's only multi-vendor bicycle marketplace platform — a platform that provides digital visibility for local shops and bicycle enthusiasts with craftsmanship stories and a community layer, spreading from Istanbul to all over Turkey."

collaboration.prin1Desc: There are no surprise deductions, hidden listing fees, or advertising models that force unfair competition. We aim to maximize the earnings of every stakeholder.
collaboration.prin2Desc: A bicycle is not just hardware; it is also an engineering culture. Only competent, authorized, and referenced shops can take part in our platform.
collaboration.prin3Desc: Your customer is your customer. We never use your data to market against you.
collaboration.flowDesc1: Bicylium is a digitalization and growth tool for bicycle shops, and a purchasing and service guide for bicycle users. The platform transforms shopping from a mere "add to cart" process into an expertly framed experience.
collaboration.flowDesc2: It is a 'mutual' business model run in solidarity by its users, where stakeholder bicycle shops have a say in the platform's policies. For this reason, Bicylium's revenue model differs from traditional horizontal marketplaces. The primary income is obtained through the participation fee provided by participating businesses. A fixed participation fee is invoiced in the following brackets according to the gross sales volume (turnover) the shop achieves that month. Whichever bracket the shop remains in, only that bracket is invoiced; in months when turnover drops, the fee automatically drops to the lower bracket.
collaboration.flowDesc3: The growth engine at the center of the system is content and community. This cultural "competitive moat" that generic platforms cannot copy allows the platform to grow organically in a self-feeding cycle.
collaboration.flow1Desc: An advanced digital showcase where stores display their products, from bicycle parts to e-bikes and premium accessories (helmets, locks, etc.).
collaboration.flow2Desc: Beyond being a marketplace, it is the main engine that attracts organic traffic. Stories honoring bicycle routes, maintenance guides, product reviews, and local shops provide continuous visits and a "non-replicable" cultural loyalty to the platform.
collaboration.flow3Title: Stock Tracking, Service Appointment Network, and Other Tools
collaboration.flow3Desc: Besides being an online showcase for local businesses, Bicylium aims to offer tools that will facilitate their operational functioning in the background. It continues to develop to become an environment where stores can run all their processes.
collaboration.mgmtDesc: Bicylium does not operate as a monopoly where only a single center makes a profit. In our future vision, a structure working with the spirit of a solidarity cooperative is aimed, where the rules of the platform (revenue sharing rates, new features to be added, dispute resolutions) are determined with the participation of active stores.
collaboration.term1: Only official bicycle shops and workshops with a commercial title can join the platform. (Individual second-hand sales C2C are currently closed).
collaboration.term2: The seller undertakes to comply with the "Fair Trade" rules (not to apply exorbitant prices) in their pricing in the ecosystem.
collaboration.term3: Customer satisfaction in maintenance/service appointments taken through the system determines the overall quality score of the platform.
collaboration.presDesc: Review the presentation we prepared as a result of market research, which provides you with more details about the initiative.
collaboration.survey1Desc: We need your suggestions to improve our project. You can help us improve Bicylium by participating in the survey.
collaboration.bannerText: Your participation strengthens our solidarity by growing our network of cyclists, thank you in advance for your support.
collaboration.survey2Desc: By participating in the survey we have prepared for customers, you can help us improve Bicylium's shopping experience in a customer-oriented way.
collaboration.bottomLink: You can send a form from our contact page to share your opinions and suggestions.

eyebrow.slide1Title: Fair Trade Principle and Transparent Economy
eyebrow.slide1Desc: We create a fair system with fixed participation fee and principled, participatory cooperation
eyebrow.slide2Desc: Join us in our sharp stance on protecting nature
eyebrow.slide2CenterDesc: Add your bikes and create maintenance records
eyebrow.slide3Desc: Listen to their stories, buy the products you need safely
